revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:PM20]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3362 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: fix double redirect to final target
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if: {{{FID|}}} {{#property:P4293}} | [http://purl.org/pressemappe20/folder/{{#if: {{{FID|}}} | {{{FID}}} | {{#property:P4293}} }} {{#if: {{{TEXT|}}} | {{{TEXT}}} | Newspaper clippings about }} {{#if: {{{NAME|}}} | {{{NAME}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] in the [[:en:20th Century Press Archives|20th Century Press Archives]] of the [[:en:German National Library of Economics|ZBW]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P4293|{{{FID|}}}}} | *[[Template:20th Century Press Archives]] – FID missing or invalid* }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{FID|}}} {{#property:P4293}} | [http://purl.org/pressemappe20/folder/{{#if: {{{FID|}}} | {{{FID}}} | {{#property:P4293}} }} {{#if: {{{TEXT|}}} | {{{TEXT}}} | Newspaper clippings about }} {{#if: {{{NAME|}}} | {{{NAME}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] in the [[:en:20th Century Press Archives|20th Century Press Archives]] of the [[:en:German National Library of Economics|ZBW]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P4293|{{{FID|}}}}} | *[[Template:20th Century Press Archives]] – FID missing or invalid* }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
